name: pstyle-reverse-binding
description: pStyle reverse binding: abstractNum level 0 has <w:pStyle w:val='ListBullet'/>. Style 'ListBullet' has no numPr. P1 with style 'ListBullet' should get numbering from the level.
expected_behavior: P1: has bullet numbering (from abstract level's pStyle binding). P2: no numbering.
current_status: TESTING — pStyle reverse binding likely unimplemented
